CustomField.description: Plain text body for the email notification. Supports merge tokens.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Email body (plain text). Supports merge tokens in curly braces — any field API name on the host record (e.g. {Status}, {Owner.Name}) plus {RecordLink} and {Today}. Follows the Prodigy four-part structure: introduction, record link, key fields, sign-off.
CustomField.label: Email Body
